$comment: Layer D for COMMISSION: static data-flow equivalence between the IR and migrated candidate A. The CALC-COMM THRU CALC-EXIT range with its GO TO early exit is eliminated to if/else, so the capped (MOVE WS-CAP) and bonus (ADD WS-BONUS) flows union flow-insensitively on the legacy side, mirrored by the Java-side extractor's if-branch union.
